name: non_contiguous_port_bit_selects
description: Code should include non-contiguous bit-selects on port wires when constructing output signals, such as assigning to a port using {wire[2], wire[0]} to create a non-contiguous connection pattern

name: port_width_mismatch_wrapper
description: Code should include mismatched port widths between wrapper module outputs and actual cell outputs, where the wrapper selectively includes only used output bits based on cell connections
snippet: output [2:0] y; wire [2:0] y_ = a | b; assign y = {y_[2], y_[0]};

name: keep_attribute_preservation
description: Code should include the (*keep*) attribute on wires to preserve them through optimization passes when used with cell wrapping operations
